Pre-Call Prep
TASK
Research the lead, read the completed form - ask
them to complete if not sent.
STEP ONE:
Establish Rapport
STEP THREE:
Uncover the
Problem
SALES CALL WORKFLOW
TIPS
1. Assess if good lead or needs to be cancelled
2. Don't cancel if they say they make under $1,000
3. Use an autorespoder to remind them to fill form
TASK
People buy from people, first step on call is to
establish trust and a connection Frame the call.
TASK
Find out real problems - what it's costing them to NOT
be hitting their objectives. Their frustrations and to
demonstrate your expertise.
TASK
Decide if the client is someone you want to work with.
If yes, re-establish rapport & then advise you need to
speak to team or access Ad Account to Audit.
TIPS
1. NEVER pitch price on the first call
2. Always advise that you need to go away and make
sure you will 100% be able to help them EVEN if they
don't have an ad account
3. Ideally request access to ad account and walk
them through finding notification while you're on the
phone (makes it easier)
FIRST CALL
TIPS
1. Come from a genuine place of interest
2. Mirror the tone of your lead
3. Laughter is usually a good sign of rapport
4. This step can take 1 min to 15mins!
STEP TWO:
Establish Rapport
TASK
Take control of the call, establish what information
you need from them.
TIPS
1. For visualisers say "looks good?'
2. For auditories say "sound good'?
3. For kinesthetics say "feel good?'
TIPS
1..Be careful who you go into teaching mode with -
NEVER to this with DIY'ers! This will KILL your sale!
2. The lead should be doing 90% of the talking
3. Write down their painpoints as they list them out
4. Avoid reading from questions - this will make you
sound scripted
STEP FOUR:
Qualify the Lead &
Set Next Steps
AUDIT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

Audit Client
Sell the Solution
TASK
Find out what pricing model this client needs to be on
and how much to charge. Use Audit Sheet
TIPS
1. Run through Client Audit Sheet
2. Determine pricing model & your fees
3. Send recap email requesting another call to run
through findings - DON'T GIVE TO MUCH AWAY IN
RECAP EMAIL!
PROCESS
1. Re-establish rapport
2. Recap their pain points and goals (from notes you
took in the Uncover the Problem phase)
3. Recap findings - highlight any issues identified
- If they are purley performance based, advise that
you are confident you can help and what the cut
would be
- If a set up fee is required explain why you can't go
straight into performance based (there's no funnel, no
data, too risky for us)....
4. Chunk up and Chunk Down
5. Advise what the set up fee would be
"How can I make this work for you?"
6. SHUT UP after pitch
7. Advise on next steps
- Take payment/send invoice & contract
- You'll get a briefing document sent through to
- We'll also send you a scope so you can see excactly
what the deliverables are and when to expect them
- We'll roll out campaigns
TASK
Onboard new client. Get a commitment from their
part.
SECOND CALL
STEP ONE:
Restablish
Rapport
TASK
Reconnect with your potential client
TIPS
1. Mirror the tone of your lead
2. This should take a lot less time this time around
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
